payload.answer: There is a potential conflict between two concurrent memories: “Sam works at Goldman” and “Sam joined Point72.” This may mean Sam changed employers, has multiple roles, or the statements refer to different contexts. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit.

entity_resolution.reason: Both concurrent writes refer to Sam, but the backend has not supplied enough context to determine whether the Point72 statement supersedes the Goldman employment statement or should coexist.

details: No durable memory was committed because the concurrent writes conflict and require resolution.
Only backend-supplied safe actions were presented.
